topIngredients.name: Octisalate 5%
topIngredients.benefit: Chemical UVB filter in a uniquely invisible, primer-like base

topIngredients.name: Squalane
topIngredients.benefit: Plant-derived oil that blurs pores and creates a smooth canvas

verdict: Supergoop Unseen sets the standard for invisible sunscreen with its silky primer-like texture. The best luxury sunscreen for daily wear under makeup. Leaves zero white cast or greasiness.
